boxDescription: The instrument panel fuse block is on the end of the instrument panel, on the driver side of the vehicle. To access the fuses, open the fuse panel door by pulling out.

boxDescription: The rear compartment fuse block is on the right side of the trunk behind a cover. Remove the net retainers, the rear sill plate, and the passenger side trim retainers, then swing the trim out of the way. convenience
